title: Bump github.com/containernetworking/plugins to v0.9.1 v3.0.1-rhel
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

As the title says

[NO TESTS NEEDED]

Addresses https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1942753 for RHEL 8.4

comments.body: Please link the BZ in the commit message.
@mheon, pushed with the BZ noted in the commit message.
